title: GWP's Perfect+ Minecraft
body:
## For those who enjoy vanilla Minecraft and also enjoy more content: A modpack that improves the base game and adds new vanilla-style content.

### This modpack includes:
- Performance improvements
- UI improvements
- Sound improvements
- Gameplay optimizations
- Overworld biome improvements
- End/Nether improvements
- Vanilla structure improvements
- New vanilla-style structures
- (optional) Resource packs and shaders

### This modpack does NOT include:
- Significant gameplay changes
- Lots of new blocks
- New enchantments, tools, armour, etc.
- New biomes (other than a couple in The End dimension)
- Altered overworld terrain

## IMPORTANT INFO:

Various Key Bind options have been added (e.g. a key bind for crawling), but inexperienced players who are unsure about these don't need to worry about them and are recommnded to unbind all clashing modded key binds (everything highlighted in red after the "Miscellaneous" section starting with "Cave Dust") in the options menu (Controls > Key Binds) by selecting with Left Click and pressing ESC.

The following mods are (optionally) configurable, you can take a look at their respective mod pages for info and guides:
- Better Statistics Screen
- BetterF3
- Blur+
- Cave Dust
- Chunks fade in
- Complimentary Shaders - Reimagined
- Durability Tooltip
- OrthoCamera
- Pick Up Notifier
- Roughly Enough Items
- Ships
- Shoulder Surfing Reloaded
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Sodium
- Sounds
- Spyglass Improvements
- Status Effect Bars
- Traveler's Titles
- What Are They Up To (Watut)
